name: gmail-quote-selected
description: Chrome extension — reply in Gmail with quoted text. Logic written in Elm.

scripts.build: elm make src/Background.elm --output elm-background.js --optimize && elm make src/Content.elm --output elm-content.js --optimize
scripts.build:debug: elm make src/Background.elm --output elm-background.js --debug && elm make src/Content.elm --output elm-content.js --debug
